other_observers: None.; First found by Pete Plage earlier that day on the Barr Lake CBC.
specific_location: Harvest Road about a mile south of Bromley Lane.
description: Large, squat, mostly white owl with faint black streaking on breast, belly, wings, and crown. The face and upper chest were pure white. The white on the upper chest formed a "V" bordered by the black streaking on the breast and belly. The owl had large, yellow eyes, and a rounded head with no ear tufts.Behaviors: Perched on the ground in a crop field the entire time.Call: None heard.Plumage: Adult
